title: B.Tech. in Electrical and Computer Engineering
content: This is a four-year bachelor's program that integrates the principles of electrical engineering and computer science. This interdisciplinary field focuses on the design, development, implementation of electrical and computer systems, and preparation of students from a variety of careers in industries such as electrical systems, communications, automation, and embedded systems. The program gives students a strong basis for both hardware and software, allowing them to efficiently solve real engineering problems. This includes core objects such as circuit theory, digital electronics, power systems, embedded systems, microprocessors, and control systems. Additionally, it covers topics related to computer science, such as programming, data structures, computer architecture, networking, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. The program also highlights new technologies such as the Internet of Things (IoT), machine learning and renewable energy systems. Students gain practical experience through laboratory experiments, industry projects, internships and research activities. These practical components help apply theoretical knowledge to real-world scenarios and prepare students for industry challenges. The program promotes innovation and research by encouraging students to tackle advanced projects in areas such as robotics, automation, and intelligent systems. They also acquire specialized skills such as teamwork, leadership and ethical decision-making. The program ensures that students are industry ready by exposure to the latest engineering tools, software and technology used in a variety of fields. Work in the electronics and semiconductor industries and contribute to chip design and embedded systems. The IT and software sector can assume the roles of software development, cybersecurity and cloud computing. The telecom industry offers opportunities for networking, 5G technology and wireless communication. Additionally, graduates can work in the electricity and energy sectors and focus on electrical network management and renewable energy solutions. Those interested in research or advanced research can earn an M.Tech, MBA, or PhD. Programs for further specialisation in advanced technology fields. With strong evidence for both electrical and computer technology, graduates are well equipped to adapt and contribute to the advancements of various industries. The programme not only opened the doors for several career paths, but laid the foundation for lifelong learning and professional growth in the ever-growing field of engineering. Passed Diploma examination with at least 50% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% PCM or above at XII level. 01 Engineering knowledge: Apply the knowledge of mathematics, science, engineering fundamentals, and an engineering specialization to the solution of complex engineering problems. 02 Problem analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature, and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions using first principles of mathematics, natural sciences, and engineering sciences. 03 Design/development of solutions: Design solutions for complex engineering problems and design system components or processes that meet the specified needs with appropriate consideration for the public health and safety, and the cultural, societal, and environmental considerations. 04 Conduct investigations of complex problems: Use research-based knowledge and research methods including design of experiments, analysis and interpretation of data, and synthesis of the information to provide valid conclusions. 05 Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools including prediction and modeling to complex engineering activities with an understanding of the limitations. 06 The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for their impact on sustainability concerning the economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment. 07 08 Individual and Collaborative Team work: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse teams, and in multidisciplinary settings. 09 Communication: Communicate effectively on complex engineering activities with the engineering community and with society at large, such as, being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations, and give and receive clear instructions. 10 Project management and finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of the engineering and management principles and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. 11 01 Establish themselves as professionals in Electrical and Computer Engineering by solving real-world problems using fundamental engineering principles and modern tools. 02 Engage in continuous learning, innovation, and research to contribute to technological advancements in electrical, computer, and interdisciplinary fields. 03 Exhibit leadership, teamwork, communication skills, and ethical responsibility while contributing to society and addressing global engineering challenges. 01 Develop and analyze integrated systems involving electrical circuits, embedded systems, and computing technologies for solving real-world engineering problems. 02 Proficient in applying computational techniques, programming languages, and artificial intelligence/machine learning tools for the development of smart and automated electrical and computer-based solutions. Passed Diploma examination with at least 50% marks in any branch of Engineering and Technology. Or Passed B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks and passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics as a subject. Or Passed B.Voc/3-year D.Voc. Stream in the same or allied sector. For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.E./B.Tech Ist year minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% PCM or above at XII level.
